=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (2:13-2:21) TS6133: 'Function' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (13:36-13:53) TS377022: The `catch` callback in `Effect.tryPromise` returns the global `Error` type. Untagged errors merge together in the Effect error channel and lose type-level distinction; a tagged error preserves that distinction and can wrap the original error in a `cause` property. effect(globalErrorInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file"

[D3] (15:16-15:37) TS377023: Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectFailure)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for entire file"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for entire file" ===
skipped by default
